strategy.name: Counter-Trade Strategy (Panel Validated & Corrected)
strategy.description: Validated by 4-expert panel (BTC analyst, contrarian trader, crypto perps expert, critic). Original 100% WR claim was a bug - actual: 77.6%. His losses autocorrelate strongly (r=0.45, p<0.001) because he is perma-long and never cuts. When he starts losing, he keeps losing. No fancy signal needed.

rules.reason: 77% chance he loses again today (autocorrelation). 122 trades, $516K avg profit.

rules.condition: He lost 3+ days in a row
rules.reason: 77.6% WR but fewer trades. No better than 1-day signal per trade.
75% WR. He is perma-long, market moving against him.
Only counter after a losing day. His wins cluster too.

key_findings: 575K fills, 216 days. Total PnL: $-60.9M. He loses 56.5% of days.
Loss autocorrelation: 0.45 (z=6.68, highly significant). Losses cluster.
After 1 loss day: 77% chance of losing next day. After 3 loss days: 77.6%. Waiting adds nothing.
Counter every day: $294K avg per trade. Counter after 1 loss: $516K avg. Same WR, better EV.
Not a BTC proxy - signal works 68% WR even when ETH is up.
Only ETH/BTC positions are liquid enough to counter. Altcoins (PUMP, XPL, HYPE) impractical.
Funding rates are a real cost for multi-day shorts. Factor into sizing.
Without Sep-Nov blowup: still works (74.5% WR) but weaker.
N=1 trader. This is a behavioral pattern (never cuts losses), not a market signal.

panel_verdict.btc_analyst: Not a BTC proxy. His losses come from altcoins. Signal works independently of market direction.
panel_verdict.contrarian_trader: Methodology clean, no look-ahead bias. Median win $113K. But midnight UTC observation lag is a concern.
panel_verdict.crypto_perps_expert: Only executable on ETH/BTC. Funding rates eat edge on longer holds. Need large capital.
panel_verdict.critic: Signal is real (p<0.001) but the 3-day threshold is arbitrary. Counter after 1 loss day is strictly better. The man just keeps losing - no signal needed.
panel_verdict.consensus: Real behavioral pattern: he never cuts losses, so losses cluster. Counter after any losing day. Keep it simple.

strategy.disclaimer: Research study validated by expert panel. Not financial advice. N=1 trader. Funding costs and execution lag not modeled. Significant risk of loss. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

ml_expert.title: ML Expert
findings: Prediction AUC ~0.50 for timing specific blowup days
Probability filtering: top 20% predicted days give Sharpe 10.7, 94% less drawdown
Top features: PUMP losses cascading, night trading activity, max position size, consecutive adding days
Best days: Wed/Thu. Worst: Tue/Sun
Cannot predict WHICH day, but identifies behavioral setup that precedes blowups

quant_trader.title: Quant Trader
findings: PnL distribution: positive skew 6.78, fat tails kurtosis 55. 4 days drive bulk of returns
Kelly fraction: 39.3%. Optimal leverage: 1.07x on $5M capital
BTC down >0.5% = 73% counter WR. BTC up >0.5% = 21% WR (strongest real-time signal)
When reducing/closing positions: 76% WR, $1M avg counter profit
Recommended: 10% of his notional, scale 0-20% by regime

critic.title: Risk Critic
findings: Top 10 loss days = 105% of ALL returns. Remove them = strategy loses money
Oct 9-10 alone = 51.8% of total counter edge
Autocorrelation-adjusted Sharpe: 1.55 (raw 2.52 is inflated)
Need $14M+ capital to survive historical worst case
Bootstrap: 99.9% of simulations profitable. T-test p=0.020
N=1 trader. Does not generalize without more wallets

validation_panel.title: Validation Panel (4 experts)
findings: Loss autocorrelation r=0.4547 (z=6.68, p<0.001). Highly significant.
After 1 loss day: 77% he loses again. Waiting 3 days adds nothing.
Counter after 1 loss day: $516K avg profit per trade.
Not a BTC proxy: 68% WR even when ETH is up.
Only executable on ETH/BTC. Funding rates unmodeled.
Without Sep-Nov blowup: still works at 74.5% WR.
